source_pr.title: statistics: fix some unstable tests in global stats
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Fix some unstable tests in global stats.
You can see these unstable tests in [here](https://dashboard.pingcap.net/dashboard/37).

### What is changed and how it works?
* Let the test TestDropPartitionStats execute linearly
* fix some mistakes in `testMergeTopN`


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
